channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Property Listings
channel.description: Live Zimbabwe property listings with branded hybrid cards — photo on top, price and specs on the brand strip. One item per active listing for the Mutapa Times properties autolist.

item.title: USD 400,000 — Emerald Hill family friendly house (Emerald Hill, Harare West)
item.description: USD 400,000 — Emerald Hill, Harare West. 3 beds, 4 baths. Emerald Hill family friendly house. Browse all listings at mutapatimes.com/property #Zimbabwe #Property #ZimbabweProperty #RealEstate #ZimbabweNews
